result.stdout:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Runs the builder.

Options:
  -o, --output <string>            Relative or absolute path to the output directory [Default: @""]
  -l, --max-level <int>            Maximum precision level [Default: 25]
  -d, --min-ring-distance <int>    Minimum distance between 2 positions in rings [Default: 600]
  -r, --release <string>           Release tag of Timezone Boundary Builder [Default: @"latest"]
  -e, --include-etc                Include etcetera time zones
  --force

commands.payload:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Runs the builder.

Options:
  -o, --output <string>            Relative or absolute path to the output directory [Default: @""]
  -l, --max-level <int>            Maximum precision level [Default: 25]
  -d, --min-ring-distance <int>    Minimum distance between 2 positions in rings [Default: 600]
  -r, --release <string>           Release tag of Timezone Boundary Builder [Default: @"latest"]
  -e, --include-etc                Include etcetera time zones
  --force
